inputs.label: Purchase Amount
inputs.businessContext: The total amount spent in the transaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total amount spent in the transaction.

inputs.label: Base Points Rate
inputs.businessContext: Points earned per unit of currency spent before multipliers.

businessContext_i18n.en: Points earned per unit of currency spent before multipliers.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çarpanlar öncesinde birim para başına kazanılan puan.

inputs.label: Tier Multiplier
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier based on customer loyalty tier (e.g., 1 for base, 1.5 for silver, 2 for gold).

businessContext_i18n.en: Multiplier based on customer loyalty tier (e.g., 1 for base, 1.5 for silver, 2 for gold).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Müşteri sadakat seviyesine göre çarpan (ör. 1 taban, 1.5 gümüş, 2 altın).

inputs.label: Bonus Points
inputs.businessContext: Additional flat bonus points from promotions or campaigns.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional flat bonus points from promotions or campaigns.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Promosyon veya kampanyalardan gelen ek sabit puanlar.

inputs.label: Points Cap
inputs.businessContext: Maximum points that can be earned in this transaction; 0 for no cap.

businessContext_i18n.en: Maximum points that can be earned in this transaction; 0 for no cap.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bu işlemde kazanılabilecek maksimum puan; sınır yoksa 0.

inputs.label: Points to Currency Conversion
inputs.businessContext: Value of one point when redeemed (e.g., 0.01 means 1 point = 0.01 currency).

businessContext_i18n.en: Value of one point when redeemed (e.g., 0.01 means 1 point = 0.01 currency).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir puanın kullanıldığındaki değeri (ör. 0.01, 1 puan = 0.01 para birimi).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
